title: Fix Microsoft Entra OAuth Callback Error
description:
## Bug
Attempting to log in via Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) with the GoodmanGroup account results in a callback error after the approval step. The production Azure environment with paid Entra should now be used.

## Reproduction
1. Navigate to the DataTools Pro login page
2. Select Microsoft login
3. Approve the authentication with GoodmanGroup credentials
4. Error is returned on the callback redirect

## Context
The production Azure instance with paid Entra should be configured for the OAuth callback.
acceptance_criteria: Microsoft Entra login callback completes without errors
Production Azure with paid Entra is properly configured
Users can authenticate via Microsoft SSO
middleware_changes: Fix the OAuth callback handler for Microsoft Entra authentication.
implementation_notes: Need to debug the Microsoft Entra callback flow. Production Azure with paid Entra should be used. Reporter offered to debug live together.
